item.title: hemostatsis
item.description:
adhesion to endothelialplatelet aggregationsecrete : adp, serotonin, Ca2+, fibrinogen,TXA2bindsactivateactivate โดยการแยก vWF และ factor VIIIรวมกันintrinsic tenasewith Ca2++Xxx+ thromnomodulin++++Xxx vasoconstriction platelet plugs #platelet plug formationLow platelet = thrombocytopeniapetechiaeFibronogenGP IIb/IIIavon willebrand factorGP-IB receptor thrombin generation Fibrinogen to fibrin
#platelet_plug ที่ยังเกาะตัวกันไม่แน่นCoagulation cascadeextrinsic (faster) when vascular injuries ทดสอบด้วย PTTissue factor (III)factor VIItissue factor-factor VII complex เกาะอยู่ที่ tissueactivate factor II (PT --> thrombin)fibrinogenfibrinfactor Vactivate factor Xactivate factor IXactivate factor XIfactor XII ไปเกาะที่ platelets polymerization using IV
stabilization using factor XIIIaPasted image 20260419154341.png cleavage of fibrin dissolution of clot circulating anti-coagulantsProtein CheparinFactor Vaprotein Cfibrinolytic systemsThrombinprotein SAntithrombin IIIprotein SFactor VIIIaTissue plasminogen activatoractivateplasminogenplasmin เพื่อที่จะสลาย fibrinplasminfibrin degradation productfibrin split productcut impair platelets function inhibit thrombin prevent cross linking of fibrin strands inhibit thrombin factor VIIIprotein Cphospholipid surface intrinsic inside blood vesse tissue factor -->extrinsic intrinsic pathway (slower) -contact surfaces -ทดสอบด้วย aPTTheparinliver diseasecofactor = calcium and VIT K อยู่ในเลือดแบบ inactive serine protease ยกเว้น V, VIII, XIII V, VIII = labile hepatic synthesis extrahepatic synthesis megakaryocytes --> vWF, 5,8, fibrinogen macrophage --> 5,7,9,10 endothelial --> vWF Coagulation Factor
